scope: no-training analytic qualification of the translation-quotient torus reverse kernel; no model or Gate advancement

methods.ancestral_gaussian: current Euclidean SMLD ancestral approximation with quotient-projected Gaussian noise
methods.reverse_sde_grw: intrinsic reverse Brownian SDE geodesic random walk in variance time
methods.predictor_corrector_grw: reverse_sde_grw plus one quotient Langevin correction with epsilon=0.1*min(variance_drop,variance_to)
methods.probability_flow_heun: deterministic quotient probability-flow ODE with one Heun correction and a terminal quotient Tweedie denoise at variance_to=0
methods.endpoint_aware_wrapped_bridge_reference: exact finite wrapped Brownian bridge with endpoint, translation and winding posterior sampling; diagnostic reference only

decision_rule.pass: only a score-only method satisfying every frozen threshold may be proposed as the production coordinate reverse kernel and tested on the existing seed-5601 checkpoint without retraining
decision_rule.fail: do not modify production sampling or train; audit the terminal prior/probability path or introduce an explicitly mode-predictive reverse transition in a separately frozen protocol
decision_rule.boundary: This audit cannot authorize training, H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT. The endpoint-aware reference can never be selected for production because it reads unavailable clean endpoints.
